commands.review_summary:
The PR suppresses the Telegram missing-default warning when `channels.telegram.defaultAccount` is configured and adds a regression test for a multi-account named-default setup.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main resolves `defaultAccount` but then still warns when that resolved account is the first sorted account and no `accounts.default` entry exists. I did not execute current main because this review is read-only, but the source path matches the linked report and PR proof.
commands.review_followup: No repair lane is needed because the open PR already contains the focused code/test fix and this review found no actionable blocker.
